form.formComment: Jumped as a despised roughie at debut, ran last of 13 at Sunshine Coast Mdn on March 29 over 1000m, on a slow track; 10 len behind Naturally Lit carrying 60kg at $101. Doubt he will trouble these.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Blundered at the start and then hampered between Columbia Reef and Demes Girl.

form.formComment: Resumes from a spell. Finished off last preparation second last of 8 at Gold Coast Poly Bm55 November 4 over 1050m, 12 len behind Fast Fusion carrying 57.5kg at $61. On debut ran last of 8 at Murwillumbah Mdn October 14 over 1200m, 7 len behind Hostile La Vista carrying 57.5kg at $13. Returns as a gelding - respect any positive market move.

form.formComment: First-up. Finished off last campaign when last of 13 at Gold Coast 3yo Mdn-Sw December 27 over 1400m, soft track; 28 len behind Valouri with 58kg at $101. First up last campaign second last of 10 at Ipswich 3yo Mdn October 31 over 1100m, soft track; 12 len behind Fire Bomber carrying 56kg at $201. Might be better off following this outing.

form.formComment: Resuming after a year in the paddock. Finished off last campaign sixth of 8 at Gosford Mid 4yo+ Mdn April 25 over 1200m, soft track; 3 len behind Dial Of Destiny carrying 54kg at $81. Previously first up; ran last of 8 at Wyong Super 4yo+ Mdn December 21 2024 over 1100m, 11 len behind Sunday Tycoon with 55kg at $151. Capable of a bold return.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: On jumping bumped and carried wider by California Comets.
From the outside barrier, shifted behind runners in the early stages.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. Resuming 5th of 11 at Grafton Ctry Mdn-Sw on March 15 over 1100m, 5.5 len behind Lord Of Flames with 56.5kg at $3.60. Second run from a spell 4th of 11 at Grafton Mdn-Sw on March 30 over 1115m, 6 len behind Ivantheinvincible carrying 57kg at $10. Should be at peak fitness now and is expected to be in the finish.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Passing the 200m, shifted in and away from Jade Trees.

form.formComment: Last start made some head-way from midfield; 2nd of 10 at Gold Coast Mdn-Sw on April 4 over 1000m, on a slow track; 3.5 len behind Galavino carrying 55.5kg at $3.90. Before that raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 3rd of 9 at Gold Coast 3yo Mdn on March 21 over 1000m, 1.0 len behind Jeans carrying 57kg at $3. Little depth here and she looks all set to open her account.
